description: Ketubba fragment (upper right corner). Location: Cairo. Groom: Hillel the elder. Bride: a widow [...] bt. Elʿazar ha-Kohen. Payments: 7 + 30 = 37 dinars. Dated: Thursday, 13 Nisan 15[..] Seleucid, corresponding to the range 1189–1288 CE. (Goitein's index card says specifically end of the 12th century.) (Information from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
